pages.text: $(bold)Crushing$() turns ores and raw materials into more — the classic ore-doubling, plus grits, powders, and crushed mulch.$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Millstone$() — a single block, even hand-crankable. Slow, cheap, perfect for a first base.$(li)$(bold)Crushing Wheels$() — a powered pair that grind anything dropped between them. Faster, higher throughput, and they can hurt mobs too.
pages.title: Crushing
